description: Traceloop is a platform for observing, evaluating, and monitoring LLM applications and agents. It helps teams collect traces, analyze quality, and manage monitoring workflows for AI systems.
summary: Traceloop exposes two documented HTTP integration surfaces: a Dashboard API at `https://api.traceloop.com` and an OTLP ingest endpoint at `https://api.traceloop.com`, both using a Traceloop API key as `Authorization: Bearer`; its open-source Hub is a self-hosted OpenAI-compatible HTTP proxy with auth not documented in the hosted docs.
